processing.text: declare @q nvarchar(4000), @message nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregularChars varchar(128), @field varchar(32), @wsID varchar(1) declare @user int, @admin bit, @m int, @r int, @i int, @c1 int, @c2 int, @currentID int, @count int, @round int, @voucherID varchar(8), @id char(13), @s varchar(8000) select @i = 1, @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_ws_id' select @round = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_round_tien' select @m = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'dmts' and column_name = 'so_ct' select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @voucherID = 'TS1', @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end update @@table set so_ct = space(@m - len(rtrim(so_ct))) + ltrim(so_ct) -- Check select @field = 'so_the_ts', @r = min(stt) from @@table where so_the_ts like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; select @field = 'ma_dvcs', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs)&Error; select @field = 'loai_ts', @r = min(stt) from @@table where loai_ts not in (select ma_loai from dmplts)&Error; select @field = 'ma_tg_ts', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_tg_ts not in (select ma_tg_ts from dmtgts where loai_tg_ts = 1)&Error; select @field = 'kieu_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where kieu_kh not in ('0', '1', '2')&Error; select @field = 'tong_sl', @r = min(stt) from @@table where kieu_kh <> 1 and tong_sl <> 0&Error; select @field = 'tl_kh00', @r = min(stt) from @@table where kieu_kh <> 2 and tl_kh00 <> 0&Error; select @field = 'ky_kh00', @r = min(stt) from @@table where kieu_kh <> 2 and ky_kh00 <> 0&Error; select @field = 'ma_nt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nt not in (select ma_nt from dmnt)&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbpts)&Error; select @field = 'tk_ts', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_ts not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)&Error; select @field = 'tk_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_kh not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)&Error; select @field = 'tk_cp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_cp not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)&Error; select @field = 'ma_phi', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_phi <> '' and ma_phi not in (select ma_phi from dmphi)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nv', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nv not in (select ma_nv from dmnv)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nv', @r = min(stt) from @@table group by so_the_ts, ma_nv having count(*) > 1&Error; select @field = 'nh_ts1', @r = min(stt) from @@table where nh_ts1 <> '' and nh_ts1 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhts where loai_nh = 1)&Error; select @field = 'nh_ts2', @r = min(stt) from @@table where nh_ts2 <> '' and nh_ts2 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhts where loai_nh = 2)&Error; select @field = 'nh_ts3', @r = min(stt) from @@table where nh_ts3 <> '' and nh_ts3 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhts where loai_nh = 3)&Error; select @field = 'ma_dvcs' if @admin = 0 begin if @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@admin, @user, 'FATran', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a where not exists(select 1 from dmts b where a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts) and a.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_new = 1)&Error; if @type = '1' begin select @r = min(stt) from @@table a where exists(select 1 from dmts b where a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts) and a.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_edit = 1)&Error; end end if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from dmts b where a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts) select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmts b on a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts) select @field = 'so_the_ts' select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b where a.so_the_ts <> b.so_the_ts and a.so_the_ts like rtrim(b.so_the_ts) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, dmts b where a.so_the_ts like rtrim(b.so_the_ts) + '%'&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmts a, @@table b where a.so_the_ts like rtrim(b.so_the_ts) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select @count = count(*) from @@table if @count > 0 begin create table #id1(stt_rec char(13), so_the_ts varchar(32), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #id1(so_the_ts, stt) select so_the_ts, min(stt) from @@table group by so_the_ts select @c1 = count(*) from #id1 select @c2 = 1, @id = '', @s = '', @currentID = stt_rec from dmstt update dmstt set stt_rec = stt_rec + @count update #id1 set stt_rec = @wsID + replace(str(id + rtrim(@currentID) , 9), ' ', '0') + @voucherID create table #d1(stt_rec char(13), stt_rec0 char(3), line_nbr int, so_the_ts varchar(32), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ky int, nam int, ma_nv varchar(32), ma_tg_ts varchar(32), ty_gia numeric(24, 12), nguyen_gia numeric(18, 2), nguyen_gia_nt numeric(18, 2), gt_da_kh numeric(18, 2), gt_da_kh_nt numeric(18, 2), gt_cl numeric(18, 2), gt_cl_nt numeric(18, 2), gt_kh_ky numeric(18, 2), gt_kh_ky_nt numeric(18, 2), gt_da_kh00 numeric(18, 2), gt_da_kh00_nt numeric(18, 2), dien_giai nvarchar(256) ) insert into #d1 select b.stt_rec, replace(str((a.stt - b.stt) + 1, 3), ' ', '0'), (a.stt - b.stt) + 1, a.so_the_ts, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, month(a.ngay_kh0), year(a.ngay_kh0), a.ma_nv, a.ma_tg_ts, a.ty_gia, round(a.nguyen_gia_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.nguyen_gia_nt, round(a.gt_da_kh_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.gt_da_kh_nt, round(a.gt_cl_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.gt_cl_nt, round(a.gt_kh_ky_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.gt_kh_ky_nt, round(a.gt_da_kh00_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.gt_da_kh00_nt, a.dien_giai from @@table a join #id1 b on a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts order by a.so_the_ts create table #i1(stt_rec char(13), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ma_dvcs varchar(32), c$ varchar(8000), m$ varchar(8000), d$ varchar(8000), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #i1 select a.stt_rec, b.ngay_ct, b.so_ct, b.ma_dvcs, convert(varchar(12), b.ngay_ct, 112) + b.so_ct + a.stt_rec, '#10$' + b.so_the_ts + '#20$' + b.loai_ts + '#30$' + b.ma_bp, '', a.stt from #id1 a join @@table b on a.stt = b.stt while @c1 >= @c2 begin select @id = stt_rec from #i1 where id = @c2 select @s = @s + '#10$' + rtrim(isnull(ma_nv, '')) from #d1 where stt_rec = @id update #i1 set d$ = @s where stt_rec = @id select @s = '', @c2 = @c2 + 1 end -- Insert insert into dmts (so_the_ts, ten_ts, so_hieu_ts, ten_ts2, ma_dvcs, dvt, nuoc_sx, nam_sx, nh_ts1, nh_ts2, nh_ts3, tinh_kh, ngay_mua, ngay_kh0 , so_ky_kh, ngay_kh_kt, tien_cl, tien_cl_nt, ngay_kh1, kieu_kh, ty_le_kh, tong_sl, ma_bp, ma_phi, tk_ts, tk_kh, tk_cp, ma_tg_ts, cong_suat , loai_ts, ngay_dc, ly_do_dc, ngay_giam, ma_giam_ts, so_ct_giam, ly_do_giam, so_luong, loai_pb, ghi_chu, ts_kt, ngay_dvsd, t_nguyen_gia , t_nguyen_gia_nt, t_gt_da_kh, t_gt_da_kh_nt, t_gt_cl, t_gt_cl_nt, t_gt_kh_ky, t_gt_kh_ky_nt, stt_rec, loai_ct, ma_ct, ngay_ct, ngay_lct , so_ct, ma_nk, ma_gd, ma_nt, ty_gia, ky, nam, so_ky_kh_qd, ty_le_kh_vm, hs_vm, ky_kh00, tl_kh, hs_kh00, tl_kh00, so_ky_kh_cl , status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, ngay_td1, ngay_td2, ngay_td3 , gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9) select distinct a.so_the_ts, b.ten_ts, b.so_hieu_ts, b.ten_ts2, b.ma_dvcs, '', b.nuoc_sx, b.nam_sx, b.nh_ts1, b.nh_ts2, b.nh_ts3, 0, b.ngay_mua, b.ngay_kh0, b.so_ky_kh, b.ngay_kh_kt, 0, 0, null, b.kieu_kh, 0, b.tong_sl, b.ma_bp, b.ma_phi, b.tk_ts, b.tk_kh, b.tk_cp, b.ma_tg_ts, '', b.loai_ts, b.ngay_dc, '', null, '', '', '', 0, 0, '', '', b.ngay_dvsd, c.t_nguyen_gia, c.t_nguyen_gia_nt, c.t_gt_da_kh, c.t_gt_da_kh_nt, c.t_gt_cl, c.t_gt_cl_nt, c.t_gt_kh_ky, c.t_gt_kh_ky_nt, a.stt_rec, '', @voucherID, b.ngay_ct, b.ngay_ct, b.so_ct, '', '', b.ma_nt, b.ty_gia, month(b.ngay_kh0), year(b.ngay_kh0), b.so_ky_kh_qd, b.ty_le_kh_vm, b.hs_vm, b.ky_kh00, 0, 0, b.tl_kh00, case when b.so_ky_kh_cl <> 0 then b.so_ky_kh_cl else b.so_ky_kh end, '1', getdate(), getdate(), @user, @user, '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '', '', '', '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null from #id1 a join @@table b on a.stt = b.stt join (select so_the_ts, sum(nguyen_gia) as t_nguyen_gia, sum(nguyen_gia_nt) as t_nguyen_gia_nt, sum(gt_da_kh) as t_gt_da_kh, sum(gt_da_kh_nt) as t_gt_da_kh_nt, sum(gt_cl) as t_gt_cl, sum(gt_cl_nt) as t_gt_cl_nt, sum(gt_kh_ky) as t_gt_kh_ky, sum(gt_kh_ky_nt) as t_gt_kh_ky_nt from #d1 group by so_the_ts) c on a.so_the_ts = c.so_the_ts insert into ctdmts select so_the_ts, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct, ma_nv, ky, nam, ma_tg_ts, nguyen_gia, nguyen_gia_nt, gt_da_kh, gt_da_kh_nt, 0, 0, 0, 0, gt_cl, gt_cl_nt, gt_kh_ky, gt_kh_ky_nt, gt_da_kh00, gt_da_kh00_nt, dien_giai, getdate(), getdate(), @user, @user, stt_rec, stt_rec0, @voucherID, line_nbr, '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '', '', '', '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null from #d1 insert into its select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, '1', @user, c$, m$, d$ from #i1 end if @type = '1' begin select @id = '', @s = '', @c2 = 1, @c1 = count(*) from #k if @c1 > 0 begin create table #id2(stt_rec char(13), so_the_ts varchar(32), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #id2 select b.stt_rec, a.so_the_ts, min(stt) from #k a join dmts b on a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts group by a.so_the_ts, b.stt_rec create table #d2(stt_rec char(13), stt_rec0 char(3), line_nbr int, so_the_ts char(32), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ky int, nam int, ma_nv varchar(32), ma_tg_ts varchar(32), ty_gia numeric(24, 12), nguyen_gia numeric(18, 2), nguyen_gia_nt numeric(18, 2), gt_da_kh numeric(18, 2), gt_da_kh_nt numeric(18, 2), gt_cl numeric(18, 2), gt_cl_nt numeric(18, 2), gt_kh_ky numeric(18, 2), gt_kh_ky_nt numeric(18, 2), gt_da_kh00 numeric(18, 2), gt_da_kh00_nt numeric(18, 2), dien_giai nvarchar(256) ) insert into #d2 select b.stt_rec, replace(str((a.stt - b.stt) + 1, 3), ' ', '0'), (a.stt - b.stt) + 1, a.so_the_ts, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, month(a.ngay_kh0), year(a.ngay_kh0), a.ma_nv, a.ma_tg_ts, a.ty_gia, round(a.nguyen_gia_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.nguyen_gia_nt, round(a.gt_da_kh_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.gt_da_kh_nt, round(a.gt_cl_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.gt_cl_nt, round(a.gt_kh_ky_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.gt_kh_ky_nt, round(a.gt_da_kh00_nt * a.ty_gia, @round), a.gt_da_kh00_nt, a.dien_giai from #k a join #id2 b on a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts order by a.so_the_ts create table #i2(stt_rec char(13), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ma_dvcs varchar(32), c$ varchar(8000), m$ varchar(8000), d$ varchar(8000), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #i2 select b.stt_rec, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_dvcs, convert(varchar(12), a.ngay_ct, 112) + a.so_ct + b.stt_rec, '#10$' + b.so_the_ts + '#20$' + a.loai_ts + '#30$' + a.ma_bp, '', b.stt from #k a join #id2 b on a.stt = b.stt while @c1 >= @c2 begin select @id = stt_rec from #i2 where id = @c2 select @s = @s + '#10$' + rtrim(isnull(ma_nv, '')) from #d2 where stt_rec = @id update #i2 set d$ = @s where stt_rec = @id select @s = '', @c2 = @c2 + 1 end -- Update update dmts set ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs, ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct, so_ct = b.so_ct, ten_ts = b.ten_ts, ten_ts2 = b.ten_ts2, loai_ts = b.loai_ts, ma_tg_ts = b.ma_tg_ts, ngay_mua = b.ngay_mua, ngay_kh0 = b.ngay_kh0, so_ky_kh = b.so_ky_kh, ngay_kh_kt = b.ngay_kh_kt, kieu_kh = b.kieu_kh, tong_sl = b.tong_sl, tl_kh00 = b.tl_kh00, ky_kh00 = b.ky_kh00, t_nguyen_gia = c.t_nguyen_gia, t_nguyen_gia_nt = c.t_nguyen_gia_nt, t_gt_da_kh = c.t_gt_da_kh, t_gt_da_kh_nt = c.t_gt_da_kh_nt, t_gt_cl = c.t_gt_cl, t_gt_cl_nt = c.t_gt_cl_nt, t_gt_kh_ky = c.t_gt_kh_ky, t_gt_kh_ky_nt = c.t_gt_kh_ky_nt, ma_nt = b.ma_nt, ty_gia = b.ty_gia, ma_bp = b.ma_bp, tk_ts = b.tk_ts, tk_kh = b.tk_kh, tk_cp = b.tk_cp, ma_phi = b.ma_phi, nh_ts1 = b.nh_ts1, nh_ts2 = b.nh_ts2, nh_ts3 = b.nh_ts3, so_ky_kh_qd = b.so_ky_kh_qd, so_ky_kh_cl = case when b.so_ky_kh_cl <> 0 then b.so_ky_kh_cl else b.so_ky_kh end, ty_le_kh_vm = b.ty_le_kh_vm, hs_vm = b.hs_vm, so_hieu_ts = b.so_hieu_ts, ngay_dvsd = b.ngay_dvsd, ngay_dc = b.ngay_dc, nuoc_sx = b.nuoc_sx, nam_sx = b.nam_sx from dmts a join #k b on a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts join #id2 d on b.stt = d.stt join (select so_the_ts, sum(nguyen_gia) as t_nguyen_gia, sum(nguyen_gia_nt) as t_nguyen_gia_nt, sum(gt_da_kh) as t_gt_da_kh, sum(gt_da_kh_nt) as t_gt_da_kh_nt, sum(gt_cl) as t_gt_cl, sum(gt_cl_nt) as t_gt_cl_nt, sum(gt_kh_ky) as t_gt_kh_ky, sum(gt_kh_ky_nt) as t_gt_kh_ky_nt from #d2 group by so_the_ts) c on a.so_the_ts = c.so_the_ts delete ctdmts where stt_rec in (select distinct stt_rec from #id2) insert into ctdmts select so_the_ts, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct, ma_nv, ky, nam, ma_tg_ts, nguyen_gia, nguyen_gia_nt, gt_da_kh, gt_da_kh_nt, 0, 0, 0, 0, gt_cl, gt_cl_nt, gt_kh_ky, gt_kh_ky_nt, gt_da_kh00, gt_da_kh00_nt, dien_giai, getdate(), getdate(), @user, @user, stt_rec, stt_rec0, @voucherID, line_nbr, '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '', '', '', '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null from #d2 update its set ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct, so_ct = b.so_ct, ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs, user_id0 = @user, c$ = b.c$, m$ = b.m$, d$ = b.d$ from its a join #i2 b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec end end
